title: 2026-07-03 Mexico City Tezontle Coral Style Study
summary: Mexico City rainy-season style-variation set using tezontle coral across Biblioteca Vasconcelos work prep, Salón Los Ángeles dance motion, Cineteca Nacional night exit, and Cablebús travel detail.
summaryJa: メキシコシティのアルバム。色の軸はコーラル。構成は仕事場、音楽の場、イベント会場、移動。

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman in a Biblioteca Vasconcelos-style library space, putting a notebook into a structured tote with a tezontle coral strap while wearing a charcoal sleeveless waistcoat, white ribbed scoop-neck knit tank, cropped slate trousers, sheer ankle socks, and black slingback pumps
images.title: 01 Office Vasconcelos bookstrap
images.tags: Clean Cel Anime / Mexico City / office / 25-29

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman in a Salón Los Ángeles-style dance hall, moving through a controlled turn in manga-ink linework while wearing an asymmetric black wrap mini skort over dance shorts, sheer smoke knee-high socks, coral-edged low dance heels, an ivory sleeveless blouse, open black bolero, coral bead earrings, and a slim wrist ribbon
images.title: 02 Dance Salón Los Ángeles ink turn
images.tags: Manga Ink Anime / Mexico City / dance / 20-24

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman leaving a Cineteca Nacional-style covered cinema walkway after rain, adjusting a coral enamel earring while wearing a smoky navy sleeveless wrap midi dress, translucent open rain shell, thin silver belt, sheer charcoal tights, black low-heeled ankle boots, and carrying a folded umbrella
images.title: 03 Theater Cineteca OVA earring

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman inside a Mexico City Cablebús-style cabin, looking through a rain-specked window while adjusting a black rain sandal strap and holding a coral card holder, wearing a pale gray cropped cotton tee, sage sleeveless utility vest, coral-stitched short wrap skort over safety shorts, white ankle socks with a coral stripe, and a compact crossbody pouch
images.title: 04 Travel Cablebús watercolor strap
